summary: Implemented Uniswap quote and swap surface with config persistence, approval-needed states, and full finance evidence trail. Created three modules: config.ts for company-scoped Uniswap configuration, quote-swap.ts for orchestrated quote and swap flows with evidence recording, and a barrel index.ts. Both quote-only and full swap flows record evidence in agent_execution_logs with shared identifiers and create activity_events for observability.

strengths: Clean separation of config loading, quote flow, and swap flow into distinct orchestrated pipelines
Evidence recording is resilient — failures in evidence recording don't break the main flow (try/catch wrapping)
Activity events provide human-readable summaries of Uniswap actions
Approval-needed states are surfaced explicitly in the result object
All error paths record failure evidence before returning, creating a complete trace

testCoverage.notes: 20 tests in uniswap-quote-swap.test.ts covering config loading, quote execution, swap execution, approval detection, error handling, and evidence recording. Plus existing 29 tests in uniswap-client.test.ts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The evidence recording pattern (recordXxxEvidence helper + recordActivityEvent) is now duplicated across Uniswap, Bankr, Celo, Lido, OpenServ, and AgentCash flows. A shared helper could reduce duplication.
